instagramAccount.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S928B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/131.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
instagramAccount.notes: time the system automatically retrieves new cookies from email/password, unit is minute, if you set null, the system will not automatically retrieve new cookies, it saves you from having to manually change your cookie every time it expires. recommended set to 1440 (1day) or 4320 (3day).TO BE ABLE TO USE THIS FEATURE YOU NEED TO ENTER THE ACCOUNT PASSWORD ABOVE

notesLanguage: change to your language with ISO 639-1 code, available languages: vi (Vietnamese), en (English)
noPrefixNotes: When true, Bot Admins (role 2) and Developers (role 4) can run commands without the prefix
notes_premiumUsers: List of user IDs with premium access (role 3)
notes_devUsers: List of developer IDs with full access (role 4)

whiteListMode.notes: if you enable this feature, only the ids in the whiteListIds list can use the bot

whiteListModeThread.notes: if you enable this feature, only the thread in the whiteListThreadIds list can use the bot
whiteListModeThread.how_it_work: if you enable both whiteListMode and whiteListModeThread, the system will check if the user is in whiteListIds, then check if the thread is in whiteListThreadIds, if one of the conditions is true, the user can use the bot

database.notes: (1) type selects 'sqlite' or 'mongodb'. To use MongoDB, paste your connection URI into uriMongodb. (2) autoSave periodically flushes in-memory state to disk/MongoDB every saveIntervalMinutes minutes. (3) autoSyncWhenStart re-syncs data on startup. (4) autoRefreshThreadInfoFirstTime refreshes thread info on first message.

spamProtection.notes: Auto-ban threads when users spam commands. commandThreshold: number of commands, timeWindow: seconds, banDuration: hours

autoRestart.notes: you can set time is interval with milisecond or cron time, example: 1000, 10000, 60000, 3600000, 86400000, 0 0 * * *,... docs: https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-cron. If you set time is 0 or false or null, the bot will not auto restart

autoUptime.notes: the value of timeInterval is seconds, url is the url you want to send the request to (automatically detected for hosting glitch or replit)

autoLoadScripts.notes: this feature will automatically load the script when scripts have been changed, you can set ignoreCmds to ignore commands, ignoreEvents to ignore events, separate by comma or space

restartListenMqtt.notes: the value of timeRestart and delayAfterStopListening is milisecond, You shouldn't edit this if you don't know what it is

notiWhenListenMqttError.notes: This is the message when the bot is listening to the mqtt server and the mqtt server stops working due to account problems such as: locked acc, blocked due to spam. You must change enable to true to use this feature.

telegram.note: Can send notifications to many chatId, separate by comma or space

discordHook.note: Can send notifications to many webhookUrl, separate by comma or space
